summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Citius AI-Native Sales Agency landing page. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend fully functional with proper integration.
passed_tests: Waitlist count endpoint (GET /api/waitlist/count) returns correct count
Waitlist join with valid email (POST /api/waitlist) returns 200 with proper response
Duplicate email submission returns 409 with proper error message
Invalid email validation returns 400 with proper error message
Landing page loads with all required sections (navbar, hero, how-it-works, pricing, testimonials, faq, final-cta, footer)
Navbar contains logo 'Citius' and navigation links (How It Works, Pricing, FAQ, Join Waitlist)
Hero section displays heading, subtext, email input, and 'Get Early Access' button
Waitlist form submission shows success message 'You're in. We'll be in touch soon.'
Duplicate email submission shows 'You're already on the list!' error message
FAQ accordion functionality - clicking questions expands/shows answers
Pricing section shows Traditional (25-30%) vs Citius AI-Native (65-75%) comparison
Testimonials section displays 3 testimonial cards with quotes and author info (Marcus Chen, Sarah Lindström, Adaeze Okafor)
Final CTA section with dark background and waitlist form functionality
Waitlist counter displays with pulsing dot and count number (1,250 sales leaders joined)
Smooth scroll navigation - clicking nav links scrolls to correct sections
Mobile responsiveness - mobile menu toggle works correctly
Final CTA waitlist form (dark variant) accepts submissions and updates counter
